Class TransactionUI

java.lang.Object
UI.TransactionUI
public class TransactionUI extends Object
Handles the user interface for transaction management.

Allows users to add income, add expenses, and filter/search existing transactions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TransactionUI(Scanner scanner, User currentUser)
    Constructs a new TransactionUI.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransactionUI

      public TransactionUI(Scanner scanner, User currentUser)
      Constructs a new TransactionUI.
      Parameters:
      scanner - the scanner for console input
      currentUser - the currently logged-in user

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the transaction UI loop, showing recent transactions and the main menu.

    • displayForm

      public void displayForm()
      Displays the recent transactions list.

    • getRecentTransactions

      public List<Transaction> getRecentTransactions()
      Retrieves the up to 5 most recent transactions for the user.
      Returns:
      a list of recent transactions

    • filterTransactions

      public void filterTransactions()
      Prompts the user to filter transactions and displays the result.

    • fetchTransactions

      public List<Transaction> fetchTransactions(String filter)
      Fetches and filters the user's transactions based on the query.
      Parameters:
      filter - the filter string ("ALL", "CAT:[name]", "TYPE:[IN/EX]")
      Returns:
      the filtered list of transactions

    • showSuccess

      public void showSuccess()
      Displays a generic success message.

    • showSuccess

      public void showSuccess(String message)
      Displays a customized success message.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to show

    • showError

      public void showError(String message)
      Displays an error message.
      Parameters:
      message - the error message to show

    • getAllTransactions

      public List<Transaction> getAllTransactions()
      Retrieves all transactions for the current user.
      Returns:
      a list of transactions

    • getTotalBalance

      public double getTotalBalance()
      Calculates the total balance for the user (income - expenses).
      Returns:
      the total balance
